CustomField.description: Set to true when the document count for this process exceeds the P90 threshold for its review pathway (CE: 4+, EA: 7+, EIS: 22+). Derived from Stage 6 document count analysis of NEPATEC 2.0 (61,881 projects). High document counts indicate administrative complexity and often precede procedural completeness litigation. Set by NEPA_Stage_Gate flow.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Document count exceeds P90 threshold for this pathway — elevated complexity flag.
CustomField.label: Elevated Document Complexity
